message:
fix: resolve clippy warnings and rustfmt reformatting across 12 engine modules, adapt 4 test suites to match

Code quality improvements across the engine crate, addressing clippy lints
and rustfmt line-width violations that accumulated during rapid multi-agent
module development. No behavioral changes.

Source module fixes (12 files):
- acquisition_experiment_oracle: add #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)],
  convert if-let + nested-if to let-chain, extract temp var for borrow fix
- budgeted_synthesis_engine: remove unused BTreeSet import from lib scope
  (moved to #[cfg(test)] block), add #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
- callback_stdlib_dispatch: rustfmt line wrapping on Display impl and
  assert macros, collapse single-expression chains
- distribution_shift_monitor: replace manual abs subtraction with abs_diff()
- kernel_synthesis_contract: add #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
- law_promotion_lifecycle: .iter().cloned().collect() → .to_vec()
- metadata_substrate_optimized: derive Default instead of manual impl,
  remove redundant let-binding in compute_confidence
- nitrosketch_telemetry: remove crate-level #![forbid(unsafe_code)] that
  conflicted with outer crate attrs, remove unused DEFAULT_SAMPLING_RATE,
  fix test helper to use make_site_with_rate
- novelty_synthesis_engine: remove unnecessary variable in generate_source,
  use is_multiple_of(3) instead of % 3 == 0
- queueing_admission_control: convert if-let + nested-if to let-chain
- self_adjusting_resolution_graph: remove unnecessary & on byte slice args
  to Sha256::update (AsRef<[u8]> accepts owned), combine if-let conditions
- transport_certificate_ledger: rename _MAX_MANIFEST_CERTIFICATES to
  MAX_MANIFEST_CERTIFICATES with #[allow(dead_code)], add
  #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)], use saturating_sub

Test adaptations (4 files):
- frontier_complex_cartography_integration: update classify_hole call to
  match new 3-arg signature
- law_promotion_lifecycle_integration: remove unused RoutingDecision import
- novelty_synthesis_engine_integration: remove unused MAX_BATCH_SIZE import
- self_adjusting_resolution_graph_integration: remove unused SecurityEpoch
  import/helper, update add_module/invalidate_module call patterns to match
  simplified return types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -482,7 +482,7 @@ impl LifecyclePipeline {
             &candidate.candidate_id,
             &candidate.statement,
             strength,
-            candidate.supporting_source_ids.iter().cloned().collect(),
+            candidate.supporting_source_ids.to_vec(),
             candidate.rank_millionths,
             self.pipeline_epoch,
             evidence_ids,
